title: pteris fragrans
intro: Pteris fragrans, also known as Fragrant Brake Fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pteris fragrans include reducing fever, relieving cough, and soothing irritated throats. Herbal preparations of Pteris fragrans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications for skin irritations and wounds.
